what_it_does: This file is a channel-attachment ledger entry that records an image attachment (att-bc285a0d) in the design-source channel, pointing to the image asset image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-11 and noting when it was added.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
It declares an attachment_type of images.
Its target is a URI-style reference image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-11.
It records an added timestamp of 2026-06-22T11:31:00.942035+00:00.
The channel is design-source and the attachment id is att-bc285a0d.
standouts: It links channel memory to a specific pitch-deck page image (p-11).
It is a minimal, typed pointer with no descriptive payload.
conventions: Stores attachments in channel-memory/channel_attachments/ with an att- prefixed id.
References external assets with an image:// URI scheme.
Includes id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
concerns: No title, caption, or description of the attached image.
No checksum, version, or resolution metadata for the target image.
The image:// target cannot be resolved or validated from this file alone.
notes: A bare attachment stub that ties the design-source channel to the pitch-deck p-11 image asset as of 2026-06-22.
questions: What visual content is on pitch-deck page p-11?
Who created or added this attachment and why?
Does the referenced image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-11 asset actually exist?
Is there a caption or context document that accompanies this attachment?
purpose_vs_actual: No explicit purpose is stated; the file functions as a metadata record linking a channel to an image target.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a traceable, timestamped association between design-source channel memory and the pitch-deck p-11 image asset.
contribution: It contributes a typed, timestamped pointer from the design-source channel to the pitch-deck p-11 image asset, which a fused system could use to locate and reason about the referenced image.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata record in the design-source channel that points to the image asset image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-11 and records its addition time.
intention_for_embedding: To register an image attachment so the design-source channel can reference the pitch-deck p-11 visual asset.
